The '''Bothan Assault Cruiser''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] developed by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] military and employed by the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] shortly before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:BAC-EGTW.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A Bothan Assault Cruiser during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]].]]The starship was 850 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length with a crew of 1,240, an armed complement of 250, cargo capacity of 5,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]], and two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].<ref name="SotG" />

Designed to fill the role occupied by the aging [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]], the Bothan Assault Cruiser was armed with twenty-four heavy dual [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, twenty turbolaser cannons, ten [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], twenty [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers with sixteen missile magazines, and four [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors.<ref name="SotG" />

In addition to the array of weapon emplacements, the cruiser's two [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]] carried four [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Dorsal and ventral hangars were located amidships and fitted with launch apertures that allowed for flexible deployment and rapid recovery.<ref name="SotG" /> Cruisers also contained rear meditation cabins, equipped with [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] arches for viewing space.

Sublight engines gave the ship an equivalent speed of a ''Victory''-class, while a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] provided rapid [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] transit.

Defensively, the Bothan Assault Cruiser was a vast improvement to the ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers it was intended to replace. Both armor and shields on the cruisers were 150 percent heavier than on the ''Victory''-class.

==History==
Designed after peace was declared between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Imperial Remnant]], many questioned the motivation of the Bothans. Some declared it a wasteful program pushed by [[Borsk Fey'lya]] simply for the Bothans' benefit, while others feared it was a sign of impending Bothan aggression.<ref name="SotG" />

Another probable explanation was the inability of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] defenses to protect the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the crisis surrounding the [[Caamas Document]].

By [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] Bothan Assault Cruisers were part of the fleet of the [[Confederation]], after the Bothan government seceded from the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in response to the assassination of several key Bothan politicians.
